Academic Portfolio (Eleventy + Nunjucks)

My personal academic portfolio and research repository. Built with Eleventy and Nunjucks, hosted on Cloudflare Pages.

💻 Local Development

Prerequisites

  • OS: macOS (Optimized for Apple Silicon)
  • Node.js: v18+ (Recommended)
  • Package Manager: npm

Setup & Run

  1. Clone the repository: git clone <your-repo-url>.
  2. Install dependencies:
    npm install

my-academic-portfolio/ (or johnoosthuizen/Documents/code/fragment-gallery - backed up to google drive app) ├── .eleventy.js ├── package.json ├── README.md <-- Root ├── CONTENT_GUIDE.md <-- Root ├── src/ │ ├── _data/ │ ├── _includes/ │ └── content/ └── _site/ (ignored by git)
